response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates extensive senior-level software development experience, leadership in team mentoring, and expertise in open-source technologies, aligning well with the Head of Development role. However, her lack of direct IT architecture and technical project management experience, limited German proficiency (basic), and minimal UML/modeling expertise weaken her fit. Her diverse tech stack and open-source contributions are valuable, but the role requires stronger strategic leadership and architecture oversight.
strengths: Proven senior leadership in software development teams across multiple companies
Extensive open-source contributions and experience with Linux-based systems
Strong technical versatility with expertise in multiple languages and frameworks (Node.js, Dlang, TypeScript, etc.)
concerns: Lacks direct experience in IT architecture and technical project management required for the role
German language proficiency is only basic (C1 minimum required)
Limited evidence of UML modeling, requirements management, or strategic IT design experience
